name: Elbmesh Rust Quality Gates
summary: Rust verification commands and review expectations for Elbmesh runtime slices.

checks: Run cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings when feasible.
Run cargo test --all or the narrowest documented equivalent for the slice.
Use named typed errors for public/runtime failure paths.
Record any skipped command with the concrete reason.

items.text: `cargo fmt --check` passes or the blocker is recorded.
`cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes or the blocker is recorded.
`cargo test --all` or a justified targeted test command passes.
Changed public/runtime errors have stable names or codes rather than ad hoc strings.
Docs are updated when architecture, vocabulary, manifest, generated outputs, or agent guidance changes; otherwise a no-docs-needed note is recorded.

blocks.description: MR requirements, quality gates, and test-first workflow.
Implementation agent responsibilities and preservation rules.
